title: Jann
html:
Jann

Jann is one of Yahir's chosen mentors from the Grants Pass / Ford-orbit era — frequently named in the same breath as Brenda Aguilera (see the canonical "make Jann and Brenda proud" line in 2022 07 18 why mom maya jann brenda dad). Across late-high-school and early-OSU notes she shows up as the person Yahir is constantly trying to get back to — "get in contact with Jann" (2020 07 28 read book), "get back to Jann about DB" (2021 10 06 get back to jann about db), "Jann Gift Basket (photo, flowers)" (2021 05 16 osu housing owen), "wrap up Jann present" and the half-drafted "Hey Jann, I am sending this email regarding my stance on the Renaissance Scholarship..." (2021 06 14 dave fafsa).

The shape of the relationship across the surfaced notes: Jann is the Renaissance-Scholarship-and-administration adult Yahir owes regular communication to, and the recipient of carefully considered gifts. Same administrative-help-as-love pattern as Brenda. The dual-mentor structure (Jann + Brenda) is what scaffolds the Ford / OSU pipeline alongside the biological-dad track.
